description: Repair the inherited expense tracking spreadsheet by correcting SUM ranges, resolving #REF! errors in variance calculations, and fixing the warning formulas.

natural_language.prompt: You've inherited a broken expense tracking spreadsheet from a departed colleague. Several formulas are broken with #REF! errors, SUM ranges don't include all expense rows, and budget variance calculations are incorrect. Fix all formulas so the spreadsheet correctly calculates category totals, budget variances, and over-budget warnings.
